programs.title: Planet Earth 2
programs.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series has been divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programs.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programs.desc: The second series once again takes viewers on an extraordinary journey to the world of dinosaurs and discovers the secrets of fossils from millions of years ago.Following ancient footsteps, the creators present computer-generated animals of the Mesozoic era to show how they lived, hunted and fought for survival.Each episode focuses on the story of a prehistoric creature whose remains were found at one of six archaeological sites.Researchers taking part in ongoing excavations there will discuss the background of the work and the latest discoveries.From Montana to Europe In the first episode we will visit the rocky hills of Montana to learn the story of an orphaned Triceratops.A small dinosaur tries to survive in the forest, being tracked by the king of predators - the tyrannosaurus.In the next part, we will move to the area occupied by modern Morocco, i.e. to northern Africa.There, a young male Spinosaurus tries to provide food for its babies.In the next episodes, we will travel through North America, we will learn, among other things, the story of the herbivorous gastonia, which must face the element of fire and utahraptors, as well as the fate of the incomparable hunter - Albertosaurus.We will end the expedition on the Iberian Peninsula, where the Lusotan is looking for a partner.

programs.title: Life Below Zero
programs.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programs.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programs.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programs.title: Empire with David Olusoga
programs.desc: British historian David Olusoga tells the story of Britain, examining how a small island became the center of the greatest empire in the history of the world.

programs.title: Treasures Decoded
programs.desc: The history of the Sphinx, the Shroud of Turin, the map of El Dorado, and a controversial piece of papyrus.
